column3: Topic
HIS → Rocket (Inbound Events)
HIS sends purchase event after patient payment. Rocket processes earn rules and credits coins to wallet.
HIS sends service completion event (lab done, consultation done). Rocket deducts entitlement uses and triggers post-service journeys.
HIS sends insurance information when recorded at check-in. Rocket auto-assigns insurance member type.
Hospital staff confirms marketplace OrderSet code + patient identity. Rocket creates/links patient, issues package privileges, earns coins.
Rocket → HIS (Outbound Queries)
HIS queries patient's active benefits at billing counter. Rocket returns highest discount with precedence reasoning + stackability.
HIS queries all standing discounts for a patient. Rocket returns ranked list with precedence.
HIS checks remaining uses for a multi-use entitlement.
Hospital staff deducts one use from entitlement (via QR scan or HIS). Anti-double-spend with row locking.
HIS queries all active member types and tier for a patient.
Well App Integration
Well authenticates user, passes token to Rocket for session establishment.
Well App reads wallet, privileges, tier, missions, packages via API.
Patient purchases package via Well App. Rocket handles payment, coin discount, privilege issuance.
Patient redeems privilege from catalog using coins.
Marketplace Integration
Shopee sends order data when patient purchases a health package. Rocket stores pending order for hospital verification.
Same as Shopee flow for Lazada orders.
LINE Integration
Patient registers/logs in via LINE. Rocket links LINE ID to patient profile.
Rocket sends LINE messages (text, flex, image) as part of marketing journeys.
LINE sends delivery/read confirmations and follow/unfollow events.
Payment Gateway
Rocket creates a payment session for package purchase or membership payment.
Payment gateway confirms successful/failed payment. Rocket completes purchase flow.
Partner Integration
Partner sends member list (batch CSV or API). Rocket creates/links patient profiles and assigns partner member type.
Partner sends activity event (e.g. "10 hotel stays completed"). Rocket upgrades partner level → new benefits.
Partner queries whether a patient qualifies for specific deals.
Corporate / Insurance Roster
Company HR uploads employee CSV. Rocket assigns corporate member type per employment level.
Delta import: new hires assigned, terminated employees deactivated.
Same as corporate, for insurer rosters. Also auto-assigned from HIS insurance events (1.3).
Package Management
Admin extends package validity and all child entitlements. Approval required for >30 days.
Admin transfers package to a different hospital branch. All entitlements follow.
Admin swaps one package for another. Old entitlements cancelled, new issued with adjusted balance.
CDP / Data Center
Hospital CDP sends master product/price catalog for package building and earn rule configuration.
Website Integration
Website JS SDK sends article read/like/share events for logged-in patients. Rocket awards coins per earn rules.
Patient logs in via LINE OAuth or phone OTP on hospital website.
Notification & Messaging
Journey automation sends SMS via provider (fallback channel for patients without LINE).
Journey automation sends transactional and marketing emails.
Journey automation pushes notifications to Well App via Firebase/APNs.
Partner Loyalty Transfer
Partner loyalty programs (The1 / M Card / K Point) transfer points to Samitivej Coins at configured exchange rate. Activated per partner when commercial agreement is signed.
